name: EMP Turret
notes: Signal Ridge only, alongside Radar Array/Covert Works. A Turret variant (see "extends") built around its statusEffectOnHit rather than raw damage — low base damage, but every hit applies `{type: emp, duration: 3}` (see game-design/05-troop-stat-schema.md's Status Effects section for the full domain-conditional breakdown): Land-domain vehicles are immobilized (can't move, can still attack) for the duration; Air-domain troops are destroyed outright; Infantry and Naval are unaffected by the status (still take direct damage normally); troops flagged empImmune (Hot Air Balloon, Glider) are unaffected entirely. Unlike every other Turret variant (cold_turret, flame_turret, grenade_tower, river_battery, wind_spire all restate canTarget), this defensiveStats block omits canTarget entirely — per schema.json's extends rule (a variant's defensiveStats overrides the base wholesale, not merged key-by-key), that likely means this Turret can't target anything rather than inheriting Turret's four domains; needs a canTarget array added here to actually function.
